title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Porter - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Porter - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Porter. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About Porter:
Porter is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Porter!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
